title: Creating a User Persona for a Mobile Gaming App
scenario: Create a detailed persona description (markdown) for a mobile gaming app targeting casual gamers. The description should include demographics, gaming habits, preferred game genres, and social media habits. The persona should be tailored to a specific mobile gaming app brand and should highlight the persona's willingness to invest time in gaming.
constraints: Must include at least three distinct social media platforms and the persona's engagement levels on each
Must highlight the persona's preferred game genres (e.g. puzzle, adventure, strategy)

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the persona description well-aligned with the mobile gaming app brand's identity?
Does the prompt maintain a tone that resonates with the mobile gaming app brand?
Does the prompt ensure a detailed and accurate persona description?
